notes: 每个 case 给定一段 diff 与期望的 type/scope，run_eval.py 校验生成结果。

cases.name: add-export-endpoint
cases.description: 新增一个导出图片的接口
cases.diff:
diff --git a/api.py b/api.py
@@ -10,6 +10,13 @@ def get_image(image_id):
+@app.post("/export")
+def export_image(req: ExportReq):
+    """导出当前画布为 PNG"""
+    path = render_service.export(req.image_id)
+    return {"url": path}

cases.name: fix-token-reset
cases.description: 修复 token 过期未清空的 bug
cases.diff:
diff --git a/auth.py b/auth.py
@@ -42,7 +42,10 @@ def finalize(run_id):
-    # token 在此处未重置
-    return
+    state = load_state(run_id)
+    if state.token_expired:
+        state.token = None
+        save_state(state)

cases.name: refactor-extract-function
cases.description: 提取重复逻辑为公共函数，不改行为
cases.diff:
diff --git a/service.py b/service.py
@@ -20,12 +20,7 @@ def process_a(x):
-    total = 0
-    for i in x:
-        total += i * 2
-    return total
+    return _double_sum(x)
+
+def _double_sum(items):
+    return sum(i * 2 for i in items)

cases.name: docs-readme
cases.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 # 项目说明
+
+## 安装
+运行 `pip install -r requirements.txt` 后启动 server.py。
